NO-PROPOSAL CALL -- the A12 skip-dirty sub-metric has now oscillated/saturated purely with concurrent-session tree state across BP(red)-BQ(red)-BR(yellow)-BS(green)-BT(yellow)-BU(yellow, 10/10 saturated). The critic VALIDATED the engineer's NON-BLOCKING Founder observation (now 6 cycles of evidence; A12 skip-dirty noise-dominated by benign concurrent WIP and has now fully saturated at 10/10 with ZERO further score impact -- a clean demonstration the sub-signal can max out without moving the dimension score; Founder may optionally exclude legitimately-dirty-tree skip-dirty from the dimension) was correctly SURFACED in the journal and NOT manufactured as a formal proposal/FIQ on an empty-queue heartbeat night.
